caption: The video appears to be a news segment from PlusTV Africa, focusing on political discussions under the title "PLUS POLITICS." The main frame shows an older man dressed in traditional attire, seated and speaking into a microphone, likely a host or commentator. On the right side of the screen, there is a smaller inset image labeled "ON THE PHONE," featuring Olusola Oyekanmi, identified as a political analyst from Lagos. The headline at the bottom reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME - BOLA TINUBU," suggesting that the discussion revolves around a statement made by Bola Tinubu, possibly related to his role or aspirations in Nigerian politics. The segment also includes information on where viewers can watch the broadcast, such as DStv channel 40 and StarTimes channel 308, as well as an online link for live streaming.
